text: Fusible link fire dampers are operated by:

options.text: Electronic loop control commands from the safety desk
The heat of the fire melting the link
Hydrostatic water pressure changes from water spray systems
Structural balance wires linked with the bridge desk

explanation: Fusible link fire dampers are designed to close automatically when the temperature reaches a certain point. The heat from a fire melts a solder or alloy link, allowing the damper to fall shut and restrict airflow, thus preventing fire and smoke spread.
